title: Rich Spring Uruguayan Mars Bar Stir-fry
description: A unique paleo-friendly stir-fry featuring Mars bar, served in a lotus-leaf wrap, blending earthy and springy flavors from Uruguayan cuisine. This dish is light and perfect for a dessert or snack.
instructions: Prepare the lotus leaves by washing and drying them thoroughly.
Chop the spring onions and dried apricots into small pieces.
Heat the coconut oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add the chopped spring onions and cook until they are translucent.
Add the pumpkin seeds and cook for 2 minutes, stirring frequently.
Add the chopped Mars bar and cook for 2 minutes, stirring constantly.
Add the dried apricots, salt, and black pepper, and stir-fry for 1 minute.
Spoon the stir-fry mixture onto the center of each lotus leaf.
Fold the lotus leaves to form a wrap and serve immediately.
